---
title: "Projects"
toc: true
listing: 
  - id: project-listings
    contents: 
        - "/projects/*.qmd"
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: true
    type: grid
    fields:
      - title
      - image
    categories: false
---

Listed below are the extra curricular projects I completed at UCLA. I worked on these through clubs, fellowships, school internships, and courses. I have real world experience working with businesses, building websites, and conducting research.

:::project-listings
:::
